title: agrostis stolonifera subsp. straminea
intro: Agrostis stolonifera subsp. straminea, commonly known as golden crested bent, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis stolonifera subsp. straminea include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Golden crested bent can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
